# User Stories

Canonical planning root for this project.

Rules:
1. Keep this folder as the canonical story registry and story artifact root unless `docs/repo-structure-contract.md` declares a split planning/artifact model.
2. Keep root index in `.github/user-stories/_index.md`.
3. Keep project-level story index in `.github/user-stories/<project>/_index.md`.
4. Story IDs are immutable; update in place.
5. Every story includes `Epic`, `Status`, `Verified`, `Acceptance Criteria`, `QA / Evidence`, and `Test Plan`.
6. Do not use `backlog.md` as an active planning filename.
